markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 20, 2026 8 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 79.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Daniel Rincon wins the Jamie Mackenzie vs Daniel Rincon professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Mallorca Qualification Round 1 by a set score of 2-1, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Jamie Mackenzie vs Daniel Rincon professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Mallorca Qualification Round 1. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.
markets.title: Will Daniel Rincon win the Jamie Mackenzie vs Daniel Rincon match by a set score of 2-1?
